generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a local news report about how our town's emergency response team drilled with neighbors last month. They said having basic supplies and a plan at home makes a huge difference in crises. Why not support civil defense prep? It's not about fear—it's about being ready, just like we do for everything else. #CommunityPrep #SafetyFirst
